product.one_line_description: Grain is an AI notetaker that captures and enriches meeting data, then delivers it to AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT for analysis and agent-driven work.

authentication.auth_summary: The source content mentions an API for integration with AI agents and other services, but does not provide any specific details on the authentication methods required to access this API.

developer_access.access_notes: The source indicates the existence of an API and integrations, but does not specify how developers can obtain credentials (e.g., API keys) for direct access to the API. "Get started - free forever" refers to access to the main product, not explicitly API credentials.

api_surface.api_summary: Grain offers an API that allows AI agents to query transcripts, search across meetings, and access a user's full meeting history. The API supports integrations with various tools and AI models.

mcp.mcp_summary: Grain provides an 'MCP Server & API' that enables AI agents to query meeting transcripts, search across meetings, and access full meeting history, indicating official support for Model Context Protocol interactions.

buildability.verdict_reasoning: Critical atomic facts regarding public API availability or credential gating remain unclear.

evidence_pool.claim: Grain is an AI notetaker that captures and enriches meeting data, then delivers it to AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT for analysis and agent-driven work.
evidence_pool.source_title: Grain | The AI Notetaker Built for Growing Teams
evidence_pool.evidence_snippet:
The AI notetaker for agents and teams
Grain captures and enriches your meetings, then delivers them to Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI tool so your agents can do the work.

evidence_pool.source_title: Grain | The AI Notetaker Built for Growing Teams
Grain | The AI Notetaker Built for Growing Teams
evidence_pool.evidence_snippet:
MCP Server & API
Let your AI agents query transcripts, search across meetings, and access your full meeting history.

evidence_pool.source_title: Grain | The AI Notetaker Built for Growing Teams
evidence_pool.evidence_snippet: Integrations with Claude, ChatGPT, Slack, HubSpot, Zapier, API and more make it effortless to get your meeting data wherever you need it.
